name: Petra Square Iron Patio Side Table - Black - Christopher Knight Home
description: You can pair the Christopher Knight Home Petra Iron Square Patio Side Table with almost any set of chairs, or loveseats. This table is sure to last you for years to come with its weather resistant powder coated iron construction. Place this table next to your chair so you will have a place to set your drink or place it off to the side and use it to serve from. You could also place some flowering plants on this table to add a pop of color to your outdoor space. You will find many uses for this Christopher Knight Home Petra Iron Square Patio Side Table.
